title: angelica dabashanensis
intro: Angelica dabashanensis, also known as Daba Jie or Daba Angelica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the mountains of Sichuan Province in China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, as well as supporting the immune system. Angelica dabashanensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
